name: @layerswap/wallet-imtbl-passport
description: ImmutablePassport Wallet Provider for Layerswap Widget

scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:esm+types
scripts.build:esm+types: tsc --project tsconfig.json --rootDir ./src --outDir ./dist/esm --declaration --declarationMap --declarationDir ./dist/types && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json --outDir ./dist/esm && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json --outDir ./dist/types
scripts.clean: rimraf dist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo actions chains codegen experimental internal query

author: Layerswap
